name: Wall Sit
instructions:
1. Back flat against wall
2. Slide down until thighs parallel
3. Knees at 90 degrees
4. Hold position
tips: Great endurance builder. Add weight plate on thighs for progression.

name: Pike Push-Up
instructions:
1. Push-up position, walk feet toward hands
2. Hips high, body in inverted V
3. Lower head toward ground
4. Push back up
tips: Progression toward handstand push-ups. Great shoulder builder.

name: Hindu Push-Up
instructions:
1. Start in downward dog
2. Scoop chest forward and down
3. Push through to upward dog
4. Return to starting position
tips: Flowing movement. Builds strength and flexibility.

name: Archer Push-Up
instructions:
1. Wide push-up position
2. Lower toward one hand
3. Other arm extends to side
4. Push back up, alternate
tips: Progression toward one-arm push-up. Serious unilateral strength.

name: Pistol Squat
instructions:
1. Stand on one leg
2. Extend other leg forward
3. Squat down on single leg
4. Drive back up
tips: Ultimate bodyweight squat. Hold counterweight for balance.

name: Toes-to-Bar
instructions:
1. Hang from bar
2. Raise toes to touch bar
3. Control the descent
4. Minimize swing
tips: Kipping or strict. Strict builds more strength.

name: Landmine Anti-Rotation
instructions:
1. Hold barbell end with both hands
2. Arms extended
3. Sweep bar in arc from side to side
4. Resist rotation through core
tips: Anti-rotation with controlled arc. Core stays braced.

name: Sledgehammer Swing
instructions:
1. Stand over tire with sledgehammer
2. Swing overhead
3. Strike tire with force
4. Alternate sides
tips: Full body power. Great for rotational strength.

name: Prowler Push
instructions:
1. Grip prowler handles
2. Lean forward, arms extended
3. Drive with legs, pushing sled
4. Short, powerful steps
tips: Low handle for quad focus, high handle for speed.

name: Kettlebell Halo
instructions:
1. Hold kettlebell upside down at chest
2. Circle around head
3. Keep torso still
4. Alternate directions
tips: Great warm-up. Builds shoulder mobility and stability.

name: Kettlebell Deadlift
instructions:
1. Kettlebell between feet
2. Hinge at hips, grip handle
3. Chest up, drive through heels
4. Stand tall, squeeze glutes
tips: Learn the hip hinge pattern. Foundation for kettlebell work.

name: Kettlebell Row
instructions:
1. Hinge forward, one hand on bench
2. Row kettlebell to hip
3. Squeeze lat at top
4. Lower slowly
tips: Same as dumbbell row. Offset handle challenges grip.

name: Kettlebell Thruster
instructions:
1. Clean two kettlebells to rack
2. Squat down
3. Drive up and press overhead
4. Lower to rack, repeat
tips: Use squat momentum for press. Efficient full-body movement.

name: Dead Hang
instructions:
1. Grip bar with overhand grip
2. Hang with arms fully extended
3. Relax shoulders, decompress spine
4. Hold for time
tips: Great for grip strength and shoulder health. Decompress your spine.

name: Towel Pull-Up
instructions:
1. Drape towel over pull-up bar
2. Grip both ends of towel
3. Perform pull-ups
4. Lower with control
tips: Insane grip challenge. Builds forearm strength.

name: EZ-Bar Curl 21s
instructions:
1. 7 reps bottom half only
2. 7 reps top half only
3. 7 reps full range
4. No rest between phases
tips: Classic bicep finisher. Feel the burn through all 21 reps.

name: Trap Bar Farmer's Walk
instructions:
1. Stand inside trap bar, lift
2. Walk with purpose
3. Shoulders back, chest up
4. Don't let posture break
tips: Heavier loads than dumbbell version. Great for overall strength.

name: Adductor Squeeze
instructions:
1. Lie on back or sit
2. Medicine ball between knees
3. Squeeze knees together
4. Hold 3 seconds, release
tips: Prehab for groin injuries. Important for soccer players.

name: Copenhagen Adductor
instructions:
1. Side plank with top foot on bench
2. Lift and lower bottom leg
3. Controlled up and down
4. Keep body in line
tips: Gold standard for groin injury prevention. Essential for footballers.

name: Cossack Squat
instructions:
1. Wide stance
2. Shift weight to one leg
3. Squat down on that leg
4. Other leg stays straight
5. Return to center, alternate
tips: Builds mobility and strength. Keep heel flat.

name: Plate Pinch Hold
instructions:
1. Pinch two plates together (smooth sides out)
2. Hold at sides
3. Keep grip as long as possible
4. Rest and repeat
tips: Ultimate grip test. Start with 2x5kg plates.

name: Overhead Squat
instructions:
1. Snatch grip, press bar overhead
2. Lock out arms, bar over heels
3. Squat down keeping bar overhead
4. Stand up maintaining position
tips: Requires excellent mobility. The ultimate full-body strength test.

name: Weighted Dip
instructions:
1. Attach weight to dip belt
2. Support on bars
3. Lower to 90 degrees
4. Press back up
tips: Progress from bodyweight. Don't go too deep with heavy weight.

name: Weighted Pull-Up
instructions:
1. Attach weight to belt
2. Grip bar, hang fully
3. Pull chin above bar
4. Lower with control
tips: King of back exercises. Full range of motion.

name: Paused Deadlift
instructions:
1. Start deadlift normally
2. Pause at knee height for 2-3 seconds
3. Continue to lockout
4. Lower with control
tips: Builds positional strength. Use less weight than regular deadlift.

name: Long Jump (Standing)
instructions:
1. Stand at line
2. Swing arms and load hips
3. Jump as far as possible
4. Land on both feet, stick it
tips: Measure your distance. Track progress over time.

name: Lateral Cone Hop
instructions:
1. Stand beside small cone
2. Hop sideways over cone
3. Immediately hop back
4. Quick, reactive hops
tips: Develops lateral reactivity. Stay on balls of feet.

name: Sprint to Jog Recovery
instructions:
1. Sprint for 15 seconds
2. Jog for 45 seconds
3. Repeat for prescribed rounds
4. Maintain sprint quality
tips: Simple interval format. Mimics game demands.

name: Ladder Sprint (Progressive)
instructions:
1. Sprint 10m, walk back
2. Sprint 20m, walk back
3. Sprint 30m, walk back
4. Sprint 40m, walk back
tips: Progressive distance builds speed endurance. Full effort each sprint.

name: Crossover Step Drill
instructions:
1. Face sideways
2. Cross lead foot over trail foot
3. Step with trail foot
4. Continue crossing over pattern
tips: Important for defensive transitions. Quick hip rotation.

name: Speed Ladder Hopscotch
instructions:
1. One foot in square, two feet straddle next
2. Alternate through ladder
3. Stay on balls of feet
4. Quick rhythm
tips: Just like playground hopscotch. Great for coordination.

name: Small-Sided Game (3v3)
instructions:
1. Set up small pitch with cones
2. 3v3 with small goals
3. Quick passing and movement
4. Play multiple rounds
tips: Best way to develop game skills. More touches than 11v11.

name: Small-Sided Game (5v5)
instructions:
1. Set up medium pitch
2. 5v5 with full goals or small goals
3. Apply tactical concepts
4. Rotate positions
tips: Balance between skills and tactics. Game-like intensity.

name: Target Passing
instructions:
1. Set up target zones with cones
2. Pass ball through gates
3. Vary distance and angle
4. Both feet
tips: Accuracy over power. Quality repetitions.

name: Box-to-Box Sprint
instructions:
1. Start at penalty box line
2. Sprint to opposite penalty box
3. Full effort (~70m)
4. Walk back for recovery
tips: Soccer-specific distance. Simulates midfielder runs.

name: Half-Kneeling Pallof Press
instructions:
1. Half-kneeling, cable at chest height
2. Press handle straight out
3. Resist rotation
4. Return and repeat
tips: Easier Pallof variation. Inside knee down.

name: Weighted Sit-Up
instructions:
1. Lie on back, hold plate on chest or overhead
2. Sit all the way up
3. Lower with control
4. Keep feet anchored
tips: Hold plate on chest for easier, overhead for harder.

name: Trap Bar Jump
instructions:
1. Stand inside trap bar
2. Squat slightly and jump explosively
3. Land softly
4. Reset between reps
tips: Loaded jump training. Use moderate weight for power development.

name: Goblet Carry
instructions:
1. Hold kettlebell at chest height
2. Walk with purpose
3. Stay upright
4. Core braced throughout
tips: Front-loaded carry. Builds anterior core strength.

name: Waiter Walk
instructions:
1. Press dumbbell overhead with one arm
2. Lock arm out
3. Walk while maintaining overhead position
4. Switch arms
tips: Challenges shoulder stability. Don't lean away from weight.

name: Lateral Squat Walk
instructions:
1. Band above knees, quarter squat
2. Step sideways maintaining squat
3. Keep tension in band
4. Don't let knees cave
tips: Great warm-up activation. Feel the glute burn.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Press
instructions:
1. Lie on bench with one dumbbell
2. Press up with one arm
3. Keep body balanced
4. Lower slowly, repeat
tips: Forces core stabilization. Great for imbalance correction.

name: Scaption
instructions:
1. Hold light dumbbells
2. Raise arms to 45 degrees from body (scapular plane)
3. Thumbs pointing up
4. Lower slowly
tips: Safer than lateral raise. Shoulder-friendly angle.

name: Band External Rotation
instructions:
1. Elbow at side, 90 degree bend
2. Hold band attached to side
3. Rotate forearm outward
4. Slowly return
tips: Essential shoulder prehab. Light resistance, controlled motion.

name: Dragon Fly Negative
instructions:
1. Lie on bench, grip behind head
2. Raise body to shoulder stand
3. Lower entire body as one unit
4. Go as slow as possible
tips: Eccentric-only version. Build up to full dragon flags.
